race.description: Grand Events Neville Wilson Series Final (Bm70)
race.comment: ELEANOR DUMONT (8) has won her past two, dominant at Terang under 61kg in a BM56 latest. Clearly relished the heavy ground that day and is another who would love it if the outer lanes are favoured which is likely given we're into a proper heavy 10 today. Go close again. BOTH SIDES NOW (6) comes back slightly in trip for this having won here over 2000m three back. The past two have been below par but she's better than that and can add to her perfect home track record. OVERACTIVE (4) was poor at Caulfield last time and has been freshened since. The win prior was good, he'll be running on out wide. BUZZAROON (7) is knocking on the door and loves it wet, he'll be up on speed and hard to get past.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
